praatAnalysis.name: Acoustic Analysis
praatAnalysis.desc: Analyze pitch, formants, and related data with Praat

page.title: Jyutping to IPA Tool
page.subtitle: Upload an Excel file with a Jyutping column and convert it to IPA in bulk

upload.title: Click or drag an Excel file here to upload
upload.info: Upload an Excel file that includes a jyut6ping3 column. The system will convert it to IPA automatically in batch.

configCard.title: Custom Conversion Rules
configCard.desc: Adjust replacement rules for finals, initials, tones, and codas.

complete.title: Conversion Complete
complete.text: The downloadable result and a 10-row preview are ready.

validation.invalidFileType: Please upload an Excel file (.xlsx or .xls).

messages.confirmResetConfig: Reset to the default configuration? All custom changes will be removed.
messages.importInvalid: Invalid file format: expected an array.

page.title: Table Merge Tool
page.subtitle: Upload a reference sheet and source files to align and merge them in batch

reference.title: Upload Reference Sheet
reference.desc: The reference sheet defines the column structure and character scope. You can upload your own file or use the default reference sheet.
reference.uploadText: Click or drag to upload a reference Excel file

files.title: Upload Source Tables
files.descPrefix: Please upload source tables that have already been processed with
files.descSuffix: . Multiple files will be added to the same merge task.
files.uploadText: Click or drag to upload tables to merge
files.uploadHint: You can add up to 20 Excel files at once

complete.title: Merge Complete
complete.text: The merged file and a task summary are ready for download.

modal.title: Default Reference Sheet
modal.showingRows: Showing the first {displayed} rows out of {total}

validation.invalidFileType: Please upload an Excel file (.xlsx or .xls).
validation.partialInvalid: Some files have invalid formats. Only .xlsx and .xls are supported.
validation.maxFiles: You can upload up to 20 files. There are already {count} file(s) in the list.

messages.readDefaultFailed: Failed to read the default reference sheet: {message}
messages.useDefaultFailed: Failed to use the reference sheet: {message}

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.desc: This page is restricted to administrators. The app will return to the home page in a few seconds.

placeholders.customDatabase: Enter a database key, for example query
placeholders.customTable: Enter a table name, for example dialects

messages.fetchColumnsFailed: Failed to fetch column metadata. Please check the database connection.
messages.selectOneColumn: Please select at least one column.
messages.selectDbAndTable: Please select a database and a table first.
messages.adminOnly: This page is restricted to administrators.
messages.authFailed: Permission verification failed. Please sign in again.
